steps.title: Find the can volume
steps.content:
The can's total volume is its base area times its height. That gives the full space inside the can before separating fruit from syrup.
$$72\cdot12=864$$

steps.title: Subtract the syrup volume
steps.content:
The syrup fills only the empty space left around the fruit. Subtract the syrup volume from the total can volume to get the fruit volume.
$$864-150=714$$
The answer is C.
